sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_17588554830d621008bc5860ceaad364
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_335329_anonymi_0.AnonymizationAJAX</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AnonymizationAJAX</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AnonymizationAJAX = Class.create();
AnonymizationAJAX.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

    getDataTypeNames: function() {
        try {

            var ids = this.getParameter("sysparm_ids");
            var dataTypeNames = [];

            var dtGr = new GlideRecord('sys_glide_object');
            dtGr.addQuery('sys_id', 'IN', ids);
            dtGr.setLimit(20);
            dtGr.query();
            if (dtGr.getRowCount() == 0) {
                return false;
            }

            while (dtGr.next()) {
                dataTypeNames.push(dtGr.name+'');
            }

            return JSON.stringify(dataTypeNames);
        } catch (err) {
            gs.info('AnonymizationAJAX getDataTypeNames Error: ' + err);
        }
    },
    type: 'AnonymizationAJAX'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-04-17 13:48:34</sys_created_on><sys_id>17588554830d621008bc5860ceaad364</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AnonymizationAJAX</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Anonymize Data" source="x_335329_anonymi_0">ef7c956b83386210d96a6b70deaad38f</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Anonymize Data">ef7c956b83386210d96a6b70deaad38f</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_17588554830d621008bc5860ceaad364</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-04-17 14:07:14</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_cd2d5d10838d621008bc5860ceaad3f0
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_335329_anonymi_0.Anonymization</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>Anonymization</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var Anonymization = Class.create();
Anonymization.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
        this.anonymized_instances = gs.getProperty('x_335329_anonymi_0.anonymized_instances', '');
        this.runForThisInstance = this.anonymized_instances.includes(gs.getProperty('instance_name'));
    },
    /**
     * Run all the active Anonymized tables
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
    run: function() {

    },
    /**
     * Return a random range of numbers 
     * or a number with a specific length 
     * 
     * @param {Integer} range
     * 
     * @param {Integer} len
     * 
     * @return {Integer} return integer
     * 
     */
    getRandomInt: function(range, len) {
        if (range == 0 && len == 0) {
            return false;
        }
        if (range != 0 && len == 0) {
            return GlideSecureRandomUtil.getSecureRandomIntBound(range);
        }
        if (range == 0 && len != 0) {
            return Number(String(Math.abs(GlideSecureRandomUtil.getSecureRandomLong())).slice(0, len));
        }
    },
    /**
     * Return a random string for a specific length 
     * 
     * @param {Integer} len
     * 
     * @return {string} return randomly generated string
     * 
     */
    getRandomStr: function(len) {
        return GlideSecureRandomUtil.getSecureRandomString(len);
    }, 
    /**
     * TODO: write description
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	getActiveAnonTableRec: function(){
		var anonTableGR = new GlideRecord('x_335329_anonymi_0_anonymized_tables');
        anonTableGR.addActiveQuery();
		anonTableGR.query();
        
        if(anonTableGR.getRowCount() > 0){
            return anonTableGR;
        }else{
            return false;
        }
	},
    /**
     * TODO: write description
     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	getAnonTableRec: function(sysId){
		var anonTableGR = new GlideRecord('x_335329_anonymi_0_anonymized_tables');
        anonTableGR.get(sysId);

		return anonTableGR;
	},
    /**
     * TODO: write description
     * 
     * @param {string} parentSysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	getAnonFieldsForTableRec: function(parentSysId){
        var fieldIDArr = [];
		var anonFieldGR = new GlideRecord('x_335329_anonymi_0_anonymized_fields');
        anonFieldGR.addQuery('parent',parentSysId+'');
        anonFieldGR.query();

        while(anonFieldGR.next()){
            fieldIDArr.push(anonFieldGR.sys_id+'');
        }

        return fieldIDArr;
	},
    /**
     * TODO: Write description
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	getFieldRecord: function(sysId){
		var fieldsGR = new GlideRecord('x_335329_anonymi_0_anonymized_fields');
		fieldsGR.get(sysId);
		return fieldsGR;
	},
    /**
     * Create field records configurations
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
    createFieldRecords: function(current) {
		/**
		 * TODO:
		 * Delete records when fields are no longer selected
		 */
        try{
            var existingFields = this.getAnonFieldsForTableRec(current);
			// if(current.string_fields != ''){
			// 	current.string_fields.split(',').forEach(function(id) {
			// 		if(existingFields.indexOf(id+'') == -1){
			// 			this._createFieldRec(current.sys_id+'', id+'', 'String');
			// 		}
			// 	});
			// }
			// if(current.integer_fields != ''){
            // current.integer_fields.split(',').forEach(function(id) {
            //     if(existingFields.indexOf(id+'') == -1){
            //         this._createFieldRec(current.sys_id+'', id+'', 'Integer');
            //     }
            // });
			// }
			if(current.pii_fields != ''){
			current.pii_fields.toString().split(',').forEach(function(id) {
				if(existingFields.indexOf(id+'') == -1){
					var dctGR = this._getFieldType(id);
                    this._createFieldRec(current.sys_id+'', id+'', dctGR.internal_type);
                }
			});
			}
        }catch(e){
            gs.info('Anonymization createFieldRecords Error: ' + e);
        }
    },
    /**
     * Execute Anonymization Table Record
     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	executeTableRec: function(tableRecGR){
        this.execute(tableRecGR);
	},

     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	executeFieldRec: function(fieldRecGR){

	},
    /**
     * Execute Function script
     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	executeFunctionRec: function(sysId){
		var funcGR = new GlideRecord('x_335329_anonymi_0_functions');
        if (funcGR.get(sysId)) {
            var evaluator = new GlideScopedEvaluator();
            evaluator.evaluateScript(funcGR, "script_function");
        }
	},
     
    /**
     * TODO: write description
     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	executeDelRecAct: function(recGR){
        try{
            var journaFldGR = new GlideRecord('sys_journal_field');
            journaFldGR.addQuery('element_id',recGR.sys_id+'');
            journaFldGR.query();
            journaFldGR.deleteMultiple();
            
            var auditGR = new GlideRecord('sys_audit');
            auditGR.addQuery('documentkey',recGR.sys_id+'');
            auditGR.query();
            auditGR.deleteMultiple();

            var historySetGR = new GlideRecord('sys_history_set');
            historySetGR.addQuery('id',recGR.sys_id+'');
            historySetGR.query();

            if(historySetGR.next()){
                var historyLineGR = new GlideRecord('sys_history_line');
                historyLineGR.addQuery('set.sys_id',historySetGR.sys_id+'');
                historyLineGR.query();
                historyLineGR.deleteMultiple();
            }
            historySetGR.deleteRecord();

        }catch(e){
            gs.info('Anonymization executeDelRecAct Error: ' + e);
        }
    },
    /**
     * TODO: write description
     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	executeWholeRecAnon: function(recGR){
        try{
            var recFields = [];
	        var encQuery = "nameSTARTSWITH" + recGR.sys_class_name;
	        Anonymization.CONSTANTS.TYPE_OF_FIELDS_FOR_WHOLE_ANON.forEach(function(val,i){
                if(i == 0){
                    encQuery += '^internal_type.nameSTARTSWITH' + val;
                }else{
                    encQuery += '^ORinternal_type.nameSTARTSWITH' + val;
                }
	        });
            var dictGR = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
            dictGR.addEncodedQuery(encQuery);
            dictGR.query();

            while(dictGR.next()){
                recFields.push();
            }
            /**
             * TODO: finish the whole rec anonym, maybe {name and type in the obj to anonym}
             */
            // nameSTARTSWITHincident^internal_type.nameSTARTSWITHstring^ORinternal_type.nameSTARTSWITHinteger^ORDERBYname

            gs.info(encQuery);

        }catch(e){
            gs.info('Anonymization executeWholeRecAnon Error: ' + e);
        }
    },
	/**
     * TODO: write description
     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     *

	executePII: function(recGR){
		var tableGR = new GlideRecord(recGR.table);
		tableGR.addEncodedQuery(recGR.conditions);
		tableGR.query();

	execute: function(gr){
        try{
			var anonType = gr.type_of_anonymization;
			gs.info(Anonymization.CONSTANTS.BY_FIELD_DATA_TYPE.TYPE_OF_ANON.BY_FIELD_DATA_TYPE);

                case Anonymization.CONSTANTS.BY_FIELD_DATA_TYPE.TYPE_OF_ANON.DELETE_REC_ACT:
                    // this.executeDelRecAct(gr);
                    break;
                case Anonymization.CONSTANTS.BY_FIELD_DATA_TYPE.TYPE_OF_ANON.WHOLE_ANON:

                    break;
                default:
                    break;
                }
        }catch(e){
            gs.info('Anonymization Execute Error: ' + e);
        }
	},
    /**
     * Delete field record
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	deleteFieldRec: function(fieldSysId){
		
	},
	/**
     * TODO: Write description

     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	getTableNames: function(tableName){
		var result = [];
		var tableGr = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
		tableGr.addQuery('name', '=', tableName);
		tableGr.query();

		if(tableGr.next()){
			/**
			 * recursive, while parentTable is not false, continue to drilldown
			 */
			if(tableGr.super_class != ''){

			}
		}
	},
	/**
	 * 
	 */
	_getFieldType: function(fieldID){
		gs.info('TEST FOR OSCAR');
		var dctGR = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
		return dctGR.get(fieldID);
	},
	/**
	 * 
	 */
	_getTableRec: function(tableName){
		var result = {};
		try{
			var tableGr = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
			tableGr.addQuery('name', '=', tableName);
			tableGr.query();

			if(tableGr.next()){
				result.name = tableGr;
				result.parentTable = tableGr.super_class != '' ? tableGr.super_class : false;
			}else{
				result = false;
			}

		return result;
		}catch(e){

		}
	},
    /**
     * TODO: Write description
     * 
     * @param {string} sysId
     * 
     * @return {void}
     * 
     */
	_createFieldRec: function(parentID, fieldID, fieldType){
		var fieldsGR = new GlideRecord('x_335329_anonymi_0_anonymized_fields');
		fieldsGR.initialize();
		fieldsGR.parent = parentID;
		fieldsGR.field = fieldID;
		fieldsGR.field_type = fieldType;
		fieldsGR.insert();
	},

    type: 'Anonymization'
};


Anonymization.CONSTANTS = {
    "TYPE_OF_ANON": {
